more.title: Kumba maintains full-year guidance, enters into embedded solar energy offtake agreement for Sishen
more.description: Iron-ore miner Kumba Iron Ore's Sishen Iron Ore Company (SIOC) has entered into an energy offtake agreement with Envusa Energy for the embedded on-site supply of electricity to the Sishen mine, in the Northern Cape, from the Sishen solar PV plant. The project entails the development of a solar PV facility located atop the already built G80 waste rock dump within the Sishen mine boundary. The first electrons from the project are expected to flow in the fourth quarter of 2027.

more.title: Municipal Building Plan Approval Delays Cripple South African Homeowners and Developers, Warns SACAP Registrar
more.description: PRETORIA — Persistent municipal building plan approval delays in South Africa are severely hindering homeowners and property developers from legally constructing, renovating, or extending their properties, according to the South African Council for the Architectural Profession (SACAP). Registrar Adv. Toto Fiduli highlighted that administrative bottlenecks, fragmented processes, and poor communication are crippling the built environment [...]
